Title: Recruit
Description: Just starting the fight. Building awareness and first defenses.

Title: Resister
Description: Actively resisting urges. Habits are being challenged daily.

Title: Disruptor
Description: Disrupting the pattern. Replacement behaviors are taking hold.

Title: Saboteur
Description: Sabotaging the old habit loop. Momentum is shifting.

Title: Breaker
Description: The habit's grip is breaking. New identity forming.

Title: Gegenkraft Master
Description: Full opposing power achieved. The habit has lost its hold.
